overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a rural Nordic village with traditional wooden longhouses, set against a dramatic backdrop of snow-capped mountains. The character moves along a winding dirt path through the settlement in bright morning sunlight, transitioning from open meadows to narrow passages between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain village approach with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village with snow-capped mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain range forming the backdrop of the scene
dense evergreen forest covering the mountain slopes
winding dirt trail through grassy terrain leading into the village
large moss-covered boulder beside the path
traditional Nordic longhouse with thatched roof and wooden walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain vista with the character walking along a dirt path toward a rural village. Snow-capped mountains dominate the background while pine forests line the horizon. A traditional wooden longhouse becomes visible on the left as the character approaches the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main path with traditional wooden architecture

events.description: passing the large wooden longhouse on the left and entering the village center

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden longhouse and continuing along the village path

entered.detail: small wooden village house with pitched roof

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the large wooden longhouse and enters the village proper. The path continues through the settlement with smaller wooden structures appearing on the right. The mountains shift to the left side of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village passage between closely spaced wooden houses

events.description: entering a narrower passage between village buildings with reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow dirt path between wooden village houses

entered.detail: grassy area with wildflowers beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character moves between closely spaced wooden village houses. The scene becomes more enclosed with less sky visible. A wooden fence appears on the right side lining the path through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded path alongside building leading to open hillside meadow

events.description: moving into deep shadow alongside a building wall, lighting becomes noticeably darker
rounding the corner of the building and emerging into sunlit open grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along the building wall then turning right around the corner into an open grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a wooden building wall in shadow before turning the corner and emerging into bright sunlight on an open grassy hillside. The path continues through the meadow with the mountains becoming visible again in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sweeping mountain vista into the heart of a rural Nordic village. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path toward a distant settlement, framed by towering snow-capped mountains and dense pine forests. As the character advances, the wide landscape narrows and a traditional wooden longhouse emerges on the left, signaling the entrance to the village. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the longhouse and deeper into the settlement, where smaller wooden structures begin to line the right side of the path. Finally, the perspective adjusts so that the massive mountains drift toward the left of the frame as the character continues their journey through the village.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed corridors of a rural village into a wide, sun-drenched mountain landscape. It begins as the path narrows between closely spaced wooden houses, where the view of the sky diminishes and a wooden fence lines the right side of the settlement. As the character moves forward, the camera tracks alongside a wooden building wall cast in deep shadow before turning a sharp corner. The scene then opens abruptly into bright morning sunlight on an expansive grassy hillside, where the terrain shifts from narrow passages to an open meadow. Finally, the path continues across the greenery as the dramatic silhouette of snow-capped mountains emerges once more in the distance.
